title: 3 Peter Lynch Tech Stocks to Watch
text: A shorthand method that famous fund manager Peter Lynch liked to use to search for potential value opportunities was to look for stocks that were trading below what their price would be if they were to trade with a price-earnings ratio of 15 and/or their median historical price-earnings ratio.

title: 1 Cheap Tech Stock That's a Screaming Buy Right Now
text: Jabil stock was in sell-off mode following its latest earnings report, but savvy investors should focus on the company's long-term prospects. The secular opportunity in the contract manufacturing services market could drive solid earnings growth.

title: Here is What to Know Beyond Why Jabil, Inc. (JBL) is a Trending Stock

title: Jabil (JBL) Partners KAV Sports for Customized 3D Bike Helmets
text: The 3D-printed helmets are developed from custom nylon carbon-fiber material engineered by Jabil (JBL), leveraging its additive manufacturing prowess and pervasive manufacturing capabilities.

title: Jabil and KAV Sports Harness the Power of Engineered Materials to Produce Game-Changing Customized Bike Helmets
text: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) has teamed with KAV Sports on made-to-order, personalized bicycle helmets that deliver a better fit for superior comfort and protection using custom engineered materials and additive manufacturing. Recognized by Time Magazine as one of the “best inventions of 2022,” the KAV Portola helmet is made from custom nylon carbon-fiber material engineered by Jabil to meet exacting standards for performance and aesthetics.

title: Jabil Inc.: Blue Chip Tech Stock Pulls Back To Buy Zone
text: Jabil Inc (NYSE: JBL) shares are down about 5.0% following the Q2 earnings release, opening up a buying opportunity for investors. The news was good but not good enough to sustain the rally without a bit of corrective action first.

title: Why Jabil's Stock Is Down Today
text: Jabil delivered a decent base hit in the second quarter, but some investors had expected a home run. Continued high demand for the company's electronics manufacturing solutions should keep the modest growth story going.

title: Jabil (JBL) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Top-Line Growth
text: Jabil (JBL) witnessed a top-line expansion year over year driven by a diversified portfolio and strong momentum in automotive, healthcare and industrial businesses.

title: Jabil Stock Stumbles After Earnings Match Forecast
text: The contract electronics manufacturer guidance suggests that growth could slow from here.

title: Jabil (JBL) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Jabil (JBL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.17% and 0.49%, respectively, for the quarter ended February 2023. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Jabil stock gains after profit, revenue rise above expectations and full-year outlook is above forecasts
text: Shares of Jabil Inc. JBL rose 1.1% in premarket trading Thursday after the electronics manufacturing services (EMS) reported fiscal second-quarter results that rose above expectations, and provided an upbeat full-year outlook. Net income for the quarter to Feb. 28 rose to $207 million, or $1.52 a share, from $222 million, or $1.51 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Contract Manufacturer Jabil Delivers Beat-And-Raise Quarterly Report
text: Contract manufacturer Jabil beat Wall Street's targets for its fiscal second quarter and guided higher for the current period. The post Contract Manufacturer Jabil Delivers Beat-And-Raise Quarterly Report appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Jabil Posts Second Quarter Results
text: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL), reported preliminary, unaudited financial results for its second quarter of fiscal year 2023. “The Jabil team delivered another outstanding quarter, highlighted by excellent operational execution and solid revenue growth,” said Chairman and CEO Mark Mondello. “Our diversified portfolio allowed us to successfully navigate a very dynamic macro environment and deliver robust year-on-year financial results,” he added.

title: Jabil's Photonics Business Unit Introduces 800G Active Optical Cable Family
text: SAN DIEGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) today announced that its photonics business unit is expanding its design, manufacturing, and testing capabilities, culminating in the launch of a new Active Optical Cable (AOC) family.

title: Taking Advantage Of A Pullback In Jabil Stock
text: The strongest stocks will often give you multiple chances to profit. The post Taking Advantage Of A Pullback In Jabil Stock appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Jabil's Second Quarter of Fiscal Year 2023 Earnings Announcement Set
text: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL), a manufacturing solutions company, announced it will release its second quarter of fiscal year 2023 financials on Thursday, March 16, 2023, before the market opens. The company will host a conference call and webcast to review the results on Thursday, March 16, 2023, at 8:30 a.m. ET. What: Jabil's Second Quarter of Fiscal Year 2023 Conference Call and Webcast When: Thursday, March 16, 2023 – 8:30 a.m. ET Dial-in: U.S.
